'''Kanda''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] stationed on [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]] in [[3640 BBY]], when he was [[Death/Legends|killed]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kanda appears in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' as a Champion boss on Ilum. He is not directly involved in any quests, but can be killed for loot and as part of the achievement. This article assumes 100% game completion, which means he was killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
